candyInfo.pageDesc: You'll unlock stay offers after booking your flight

couponDetailDesc: Get exclusive discounts for Trip.com Flyers when booking properties with the "Flyer Exclusive" tag. The room rate will be automatically discounted at the time of booking - no extra steps are required.

candyInfo.bannerDesc: Continue booking to unlock hotel discounts of up to 25%!
candyInfo.popUpTitle: Unlock hotel rewards by booking a flight

offerCardInfo.desc: Book a flight & save up to 25% on your hotel
offerCardInfo.subDesc: Don't miss out! Join 28% of Trip.com flyers and book your stay for less.

bannerInfo.secondaryDesc: Cancel hotels free if your flight gets rescheduled
